fields.label: Public Key
fields.placeholder: Your TiDB Cloud API public key
fields.description: TiDB Cloud API public key used as the HTTP Digest username. Create or view organization API keys in TiDB Cloud API Keys: https://tidbcloud.com/org-settings/api-keys.

fields.label: Private Key
fields.placeholder: Your TiDB Cloud API private key
fields.description: TiDB Cloud API private key used as the HTTP Digest password. TiDB Cloud only shows the private key when you create the API key.

actions.name: get_api_key
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud API key by access key.

accessKey.description: The public access key value of the TiDB Cloud API key to fetch.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud API key.

anyOf.description: The API key resource name.
The display name of the API key.
The role assigned to the API key.
The masked secret key value returned by TiDB Cloud.

outputSchema.description: One TiDB Cloud API key visible to the connected credential.

actions.name: get_branch
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential branch by branch ID.

clusterId.description: The TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential cluster ID.

branchId.description: The TiDB Cloud branch ID to fetch.

view.description: The detail level for the branch response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential branch.

name.description: The branch resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

branchId.description: The branch ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The user-defined branch display name, if returned.

clusterId.description: The cluster ID to which the branch belongs.

parentId.description: The parent branch ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

state.description: The current branch state, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

createTime.description: The branch creation timestamp, if returned.

updateTime.description: The branch update timestamp, if returned.

outputSchema.description: One TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential branch payload.

actions.name: get_cluster
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Starter, Essential, or Dedicated cluster by ID.

apiFamily.description: The TiDB Cloud API family to query.

clusterId.description: The TiDB Cloud cluster ID to fetch.

view.description: The detail level for Starter and Essential clusters.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud cluster.

name.description: The cluster resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The user-defined display name of the cluster, if returned.

state.description: The current cluster state, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

version.description: The TiDB version of the cluster, if returned.

regionId.description: The region ID for a Dedicated cluster, if returned.

name.description: The region resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

regionId.description: The region identifier, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The display name of the region, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

cloudProvider.description: The cloud provider where the region is located, if returned.

region.description: The TiDB Cloud region payload returned by the API.

cloudProvider.description: The cloud provider where the cluster is located, if returned.

servicePlan.description: The service plan for a Starter or Essential instance, if returned.

anyOf.description: The labels returned by TiDB Cloud.

createTime.description: The cluster creation timestamp, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

updateTime.description: The cluster update timestamp, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

outputSchema.description: The TiDB Cloud cluster payload returned by the API.

actions.name: get_export
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential export task.

clusterId.description: The TiDB Cloud Starter or Essential cluster ID.

exportId.description: The TiDB Cloud export task ID to fetch.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud export task.

name.description: The export task resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

exportId.description: The export task ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

clusterId.description: The cluster ID for the export task.

displayName.description: The display name of the export task, if returned.

state.description: The current export task state, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

createTime.description: The export task creation timestamp, if returned.

anyOf.description: The export task update timestamp, if returned.
The export task completion timestamp, if returned.

outputSchema.description: One TiDB Cloud export task payload returned by the API.

actions.name: get_import
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Starter, Essential, or Dedicated import task.

apiFamily.description: The TiDB Cloud API family to query.

clusterId.description: The TiDB Cloud cluster ID that contains the import task.

importId.description: The TiDB Cloud import task ID to fetch.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud import task.

name.description: The import task resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

importId.description: The import task ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

id.description: The deprecated import task ID field, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

clusterId.description: The target cluster ID for the import task.

state.description: The current import task state, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

completePercent.description: The import task completion percentage, if returned.

anyOf.description: The import task completion timestamp, if returned.

message.description: The import task message, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

outputSchema.description: One TiDB Cloud import task payload returned by the API.

actions.name: get_node_spec
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Dedicated node spec by region, component type, and key.

regionId.description: The TiDB Cloud region ID to query, such as aws-us-east-1.

componentType.description: The TiDB Dedicated component type to query.

nodeSpecKey.description: The TiDB Cloud node spec key to fetch, such as 8C32G.

projectId.description: The project ID used to fetch node spec details.

clusterId.description: The cluster ID used to fetch node spec details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud Dedicated node spec.

name.description: The node spec resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

regionId.description: The region ID where the node spec is available.

componentType.description: The TiDB component type for this node spec.

nodeSpecKey.description: The node spec key, such as 8C32G.

displayName.description: The display name of the node spec, if returned.

outputSchema.description: The TiDB Cloud Dedicated node spec payload returned by the API.

actions.name: get_region
actions.description: Fetch one TiDB Cloud Dedicated region by region ID.

regionId.description: The TiDB Cloud region ID to fetch, such as aws-us-east-1.

projectId.description: The project ID used to fetch region details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one TiDB Cloud Dedicated region.

name.description: The region resource name, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

regionId.description: The region identifier, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The display name of the region, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

cloudProvider.description: The cloud provider where the region is located, if returned.

outputSchema.description: The TiDB Cloud region payload returned by the API.

actions.name: list_api_keys
actions.description: List TiDB Cloud API keys visible to the connected organization API key.

projectId.description: The project ID used to filter API keys.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of API keys to return.

pageToken.description: The pagination token from a previous list_api_keys response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TiDB Cloud API keys.

anyOf.description: The API key resource name.
The display name of the API key.
The role assigned to the API key.
The masked secret key value returned by TiDB Cloud.

items.description: One TiDB Cloud API key visible to the connected credential.

apiKeys.description: The API keys returned by TiDB Cloud.

anyOf.description: The token to retrieve the next page of results, if one is available.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing TiDB Cloud API keys.

actions.name: list_audit_logs
actions.description: List TiDB Cloud console audit logs for security and change tracking.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of audit logs to return.

pageToken.description: The pagination token from a previous list_audit_logs response.

startTime.description: Return audit logs created on or after this timestamp.

endTime.description: Return audit logs created before or at this timestamp.

auditEventTypes.description: The TiDB Cloud audit event type filter.

keyword.description: The search keyword used to filter audit logs.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TiDB Cloud console audit logs.

id.description: The audit log ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

eventType.description: The audit event type, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

result.description: The operation result, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

operationEmail.description: The email address of the user who performed the operation.

startTime.description: The operation start timestamp, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

endTime.description: The operation end timestamp, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

projectId.description: The related project ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

clusterId.description: The related cluster ID, if returned by TiDB Cloud.

items.description: One TiDB Cloud console audit log entry.

auditLogs.description: The audit logs returned by TiDB Cloud.

anyOf.description: The token to retrieve the next page of results, if one is available.
The total number of matching records, if returned by TiDB.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for listing TiDB Cloud audit logs.
